title: Staffing Falls Below Execution Threshold
scenario: A clinical action requires a minimum staffing threshold, but staffing falls below that threshold before execution.
initial_state: The action was authorized while staffing appeared sufficient.
state_transition: Required staffing becomes insufficient before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of required staffing resources.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because staffing resources no longer satisfy execution requirements.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required staffing thresholds are not met.
